data.body:
### Planning Intelligence Log

- **Web research (Step 2.6)**: triggered — re-triggered via gate
  - Bright-line conditions that fired: External integration (GitHub PR comment reply API — POST /pulls/{n}/comments/{id}/replies and POST /issues/{n}/comments not previously used in project)
- **Scenario analysis (Step 2.75)**: triggered — re-triggered via gate
  - Scenarios surviving blue team filter: 25 total (12 original batch + 13 new batch after web research)
- **Practitioner-requested additional cycles**: web research re-run 1 time; scenario analysis re-run 1 time
- **Follow-on scrutiny (Step 0)**: not triggered
- **Feasibility resolution (Step 2.5)**: not triggered
- **LLM-instruction signal (Step 5)**: not triggered
